zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Harington於1375年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾布拉可洛德時，他的父親Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton33歲，母親Isabel English25歲。他於1397年9月27日與Ellen DeUrswick結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1403年被列為knighted。他去世於1417年9月在法國卡爾瓦多斯凱享年42歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾蘭卡斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James Harington于1375年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾布拉可洛德时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton33岁，母亲Isabel English25岁。他于1397年9月27日与Ellen DeUrswick结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1403年被列为knighted。他去世于1417年9月在法国卡爾瓦多斯凱享年42岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾蘭卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Harington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Harrington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Harington was born in 1375, in Blackrod, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, was 33 and his mother, Isabel English, was 25. He married Ellen DeUrswick on 27 September 1397. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. In 1403, at the age of 28, his occupation is listed as knighted. He died in September 1417, in Caen, Calvados, France, at the age of 42, and was buried in Lancaster, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Harington est né en 1375, à Blackrod, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isabel English, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Ellen DeUrswick le 27 septembre 1397. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. En 1403, à l’âge de 28 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est knighted. Il est décédé en septembre 1417, à Caen, Calvados, France, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir James Harington 1375 in Blackrod, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton 33 und seine Mutter Isabel English 25. Er hat am 27. September 1397 Ellen DeUrswick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1403, als er 28 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als knighted aufgeführt. Er starb im September 1417 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Caen, Calvados, Frankreich und wurde in Lancaster, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Harington è nato il nel 1375 nel Blackrod, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Isabel English, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Ellen DeUrswick il 27 settembre 1397. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1403, all'età di 28 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come knighted. Morì nel settembre 1417, nel Caen, Calvados, Francia, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Lancaster, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Haringtonが1375年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアブラクロドで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Harington of Farletonは33歳，母Isabel Englishは25歳であった。1397年9月27日にEllen DeUrswickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1403年，28歳の時，職業はknightedと記録されている。彼は1417年9月にフランスカルヴァドスケンで42歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアランカスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Harington(이)가 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 블랙로드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel English(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1397년 9월 27일 Ellen DeUrswick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1403년, 28세의 나이로 그의 직업은 knighted이었다. 그는 1417년 9월 프랑스 캘바도스 카이에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 랭커스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Harington nasceu em 1375, em Blackrod, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Isabel English, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen DeUrswick em 27 de setembro de 1397. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1403, com 28 anos, sua profissão aparece como knighted. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1417, em Caen, Calvados, França, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Harington родился в 1375 г. в местности блэккрод, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel English, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen DeUrswick 27 сентября 1397 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. В 1403 году, в возрасте 28 лет,  он работал по профессии knighted. Он умер сентябрь 1417 г. в местности каен, калвадос, Франция в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir James Harington nació en 1375, en Blackrod, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Isabel English, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Ellen DeUrswick el 27 de septiembre de 1397. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1403, a la edad de 28 años, su ocupación registrada era knighted. Murió en septiembre de 1417, en Caen, Calvados, Francia, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
